slice_name: Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate

flows.name: Freelancer creates and manages a client project with currency and billable rate
flows.trigger: Authenticated freelancer submits a project create, edit, or delete request via the web application

steps.action: Web Ingress receives the HTTP project management request (create/edit/delete/list) and dispatches it in-process to Project Management, which returns a server-rendered HTML response

Project Management calls Identity & Auth in-process to resolve the current authenticated session and obtain the freelancer identity (E1 reference) used to scope all project data reads and writes to the owning freelancer

Project Management persists and retrieves client project records (E2 — Client Project, E5 — Currency, E6 — Client, E7 — Billable Rate) to/from Data Store, scoped to the resolved freelancer identity; covers create, read (list + detail), update, and delete

failure_path.trigger: Freelancer submits a project management request but has no valid authenticated session (session absent or expired)
failure_path.arrives_at: Identity & Auth returns no authenticated identity; Project Management cannot determine ownership and rejects the request as unauthorized; Web Ingress returns an appropriate HTTP error response (e.g. redirect to sign-in)
